description: Follow-up fixes from code review: (1) Fix 'now' and 'current' substring false positives in queryMightNeedTools by adding leading spaces, (2) Deduplicate learned_facts.mk, (3) Fix stripToolCallJson global trim that collapses multi-paragraph responses.
steps: In MK_OS/orchestrator/context_builder.cpp, change 'now' to ' now' and 'current' to ' current' in the toolKeywords vector to avoid substring matches inside words like 'know', 'known', 'currently'.
In MK_OS/ai_core/hre/knowledge_files/learned_facts.mk, remove the 54 duplicate 'mars|is_a|planet|1' lines, keeping only one copy.

In MK_OS/orchestrator/conversation_loop.cpp, remove the final global trim logic in stripToolCallJson() (the find_first_not_of / find_last_not_of applied to the entire string at the end). Only local trimming at removal sites should remain.
acceptance_criteria: queryMightNeedTools returns false for 'I know that' (no substring match on 'now' inside 'know')
queryMightNeedTools returns true for 'what time is it now' (matches ' now' with leading space)
stripToolCallJson does not apply global trim to the entire result string
The project compiles cleanly and tests pass
verification: Run: cd MK_OS && g++ -std=c++17 -O2 -Wall -DLINUX -o mk_os system/mk_entry.cpp -lcurl -lsqlite3
Run: cd MK_OS && g++ -std=c++17 -O2 -Wall -DLINUX -o mk_os_test tests/test_main.cpp -lcurl -lsqlite3 && ./mk_os_test
findings: Build compiles cleanly (zero errors, only pre-existing warnings). All 96 tests pass with 508 assertions. The ' check' keyword also got a leading space to prevent matching 'unchecked', 'checkout', etc.
